description_long: A rectangular terracotta planter box contains several stylized yellow-brown flowers with large, rounded petals and prominent central discs. The flowers are distributed at varying heights, with some standing tall and others closer to the rim of the planter. Slender, green, grass-like leaves and stems fill the base, creating a dense, lively appearance. The planter itself has a slightly flared rim and a matte, earthy finish, typical of urban decorative pots. The flowers exhibit a radial symmetry, and their petals overlap slightly, giving a layered look. This object would commonly be found on sidewalks, in parks, or on balconies as an ornamental feature.
description: A terracotta planter box filled with stylized yellow-brown flowers and dense green grass-like leaves. The flowers have large, rounded petals and are arranged at varying heights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the planter's rectangular shape and a partial view of the flowers and dense green leaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full display of flower faces and the layered arrangement of petals.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a focus on the grass-like leaves and the side profile of the flowers.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the backs of the flowers and the full width of the planter box.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration around a central disc, with each flower displaying a single whorl of overlapping, rounded petals. The arrangement is symmetrical and typical of daisy-like composite flowers.
